data.title: Sprint prompt templates: primary_ticket_id migration
data.description:
Edit sprint prompt templates to complete terminology migration (SC5).

## Files to Edit
1. plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md:
   - EPIC_ID: <epic_id> -> PRIMARY_TICKET_ID: <primary_ticket_id>

2. plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/ci-failure-validation-state.md:
   - epicId -> primaryTicketId in JSON schema
   - sprint-validation-<epic-id> -> sprint-validation-<primary-ticket-id> in path

3. plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/epic-complexity-evaluator.md:
   - Title "Epic Complexity Evaluator" -> "Primary Ticket Complexity Evaluator"
   - Update inline epic references

4. SKILL.md context envelope variables: Now update to pass primary_ticket_id to new prompt template keys (aligning both SKILL.md and templates).

## TDD Exemption
Exempt — mechanical key/identifier renames in prompt template files with no conditional logic (unit exemption criterion #2: change-detector). Task 3 test_prompt_primary_ticket_id verifies the result.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] red-task-escalation.md contains PRIMARY_TICKET_ID
  Verify: grep -q "PRIMARY_TICKET_ID" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md
- [ ] ci-failure-validation-state.md contains primaryTicketId
  Verify: grep -q "primaryTicketId" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/ci-failure-validation-state.md
- [ ] epic-complexity-evaluator.md title updated
  Verify: grep -qi "Primary Ticket Complexity" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/epic-complexity-evaluator.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
